title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Committed and pushed session handoff status visibility slice as 049d3a0 feat: expose session handoff status. Verified this was not already implemented: prior status only reported project counts and doctor only reported handoff files older than the stale-cache threshold. New shared src/meeting_ingest/session_handoffs.py planner feeds session-inbox, status --json, and doctor --json. status now includes session_handoffs counts/results; project status includes counts; doctor maps pending/stale/invalid handoffs to session_handoff_pending/session_handoff_stale/session_handoff_invalid issues. Updated artifact/provider contracts, implementation plan, and inbox workflow docs. Verification before commit: uv run pytest => 133 passed; py_compile passed; git diff --check passed. Pushed main to origin/main.
next_actions: Next slice options: host-specific extractor adapter design for Codex/Claude/Supa/T3 if a callable sub-agent surface is available, or a cleanup/repair command for stale handoff cache records.
continuation_hint: Next: Next slice options: host-specific extractor adapter design for Codex/Claude/Supa/T3 if a callable sub-agent surface is available, or a cleanup/repair command for stale handoff cache records.
